message:
Attribute worktree sessions to parent project instead of filtering them out

Worktree directories (.worktrees/) are now returned with the parent
project's dirId, so their sessions get imported under the parent project
rather than being discarded. importProjects skips the project row upsert
for duplicate dirIds to preserve the parent's metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
